content: Add --output-format stream-json mode to claw that emits real-time NDJSON events (tool_start, tool_end, delta, done)
Implement the streaming JSON renderer in main.rs that hooks into the tool executor and API stream events
Update clawRuntime.ts to spawn claw with --output-format stream-json and parse the NDJSON events in real-time
Remove the fake replay delays from processSuccess()
Build the claw binary and test end-to-end
